claim: Agents today execute and forget; they lack learning mechanisms and must be manually updated whenever new information should be integrated
actionable: Implement agent expertise files (mental models) that agents update autonomously; build self-improving workflows where agents store and reuse expertise without human intervention
source_title: Agent Experts: Finally, Agents That ACTUALLY Learn

claim: Agent experts are self-improving template metaprompts that automatically accumulate and manage expertise via mental models (YAML expertise files)
actionable: Create expertise files that store domain-specific knowledge; wire agents to read and validate expertise against source code; implement self-improve prompts that update expertise
source_title: Agent Experts: Finally, Agents That ACTUALLY Learn

claim: Meta-agentics (meta prompts, meta agents, meta skills) enable agents to build other agents and prompts dynamically, accelerating system scaling
actionable: Build meta prompts that generate new prompts; use meta agents to instantiate specialized agents; create meta skills that generate new skills on demand
source_title: Agent Experts: Finally, Agents That ACTUALLY Learn

claim: Expertise files are working memory, not source of truth; they enable agents to validate understanding against actual code while maintaining useful mental models
actionable: Keep expertise files as auxiliary mental models; always validate against source code (the true source of truth); update expertise incrementally as code changes
source_title: Agent Experts: Finally, Agents That ACTUALLY Learn

claim: Scaling agent expertise via multiple orchestrated agents on the same prompt validates answers and improves confidence; 5 agents beating 1 agent on same task
actionable: Create orchestration systems that spawn multiple agent instances on same task; use majority or consensus voting to validate outputs before committing changes
source_title: Agent Experts: Finally, Agents That ACTUALLY Learn

claim: Context delegation via planning agents that expand vague prompts into detailed specs, then pass to builder agents, prevents context window overflow
actionable: Use planner agents to expand requirements; builder agents focus on specific specs; compress context between steps; handoff cleanly between stages
source_title: Agent Experts: Finally, Agents That ACTUALLY Learn

claim: Three-step agentic workflow (plan, build, self-improve) where self-improve updates expertise files keeps agents learning without human oversight
actionable: Implement plan→build→self-improve loops; have self-improve prompt read and update expertise files; store diffs of changes for validation
source_title: Agent Experts: Finally, Agents That ACTUALLY Learn
